description: An urgent issue has been reported with the currently active '2024 Employee Voice' survey: the 'Department' question was accidentally omitted. The survey has already collected 15 responses which MUST be preserved. Modify the survey to include a new List (Radio) question in the 'Demographics' group with Code 'dept', Question 'Which department do you work in?', and Options 'Sales', 'Engineering', 'HR', and 'Support'. Ensure the final survey is active and contains the 15 original responses restored from the previous response table.
